---
title: "gen"
format: html
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
```

```{r}
set.seed(0)
N <- 500
dt <- 0.1
T <- N*dt
f <- 2*pi/T *2
df <- tibble(
  id = 1:N,
  timecode = (id-1)*dt,
  sensor.temperature = 10*sin(timecode*f) + rnorm(100, 0, 2),
  sensor.humidity = NA
)
```





```{r}
d <- 0
df$sensor.humidity <- list(
  ar = c(0.7, -0.4),
  ma = c(0.2, 0.5, 0.2, 0.1),
  order = c(2, d, 4)
) %>% arima.sim(N-d) + 20


df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=timecode)) + 
  geom_line(aes(y = sensor.temperature, color="temp")) + 
  geom_line(aes(y = sensor.humidity, color="hum"))


```


```{r}
write_csv(df, "example.csv")
```

```{r}
forecast::ggtsdisplay(df$sensor.humidity)
```
